description_long: This is a single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The exterior features a mix of large windows and wooden accents, providing ample natural light and a warm, inviting appearance. A prominent covered porch with a pergola and hot tub extends from the main living area, creating an outdoor living space. The property includes a driveway with two parked cars and landscaped greenery near the entrance. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, and communal spaces, all accessible from a central hallway. The overall design is modern with functional outdoor and indoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story brick bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a covered porch featuring a pergola and hot tub.
description_view_0: View 0 highlights the covered porch with pergola and hot tub, as well as the main living area with large windows and brick exterior.
description_view_1: View 1 shows the rear of the bungalow, revealing the interior room layout and the driveway with two cars.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, emphasizing the driveway, parked cars, and the linear arrangement of windows along the brick facade.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the entrance area, landscaped greenery, and the side of the porch with the pergola structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
